name: @mushi-mushi/server
description: Mushi Mushi backend — Supabase Edge Functions: API ingestion, LLM classification, Slack notifications

scripts.build: echo 'server: edge functions deploy via supabase CLI'
scripts.dev: cd supabase && supabase functions serve --no-verify-jwt || echo 'server: skipped — Docker not running'
scripts.deploy:api: cd supabase && supabase functions deploy api
scripts.deploy:classify: cd supabase && supabase functions deploy classify-report

author: Kenji Sakuramoto
